# Section Blueprints

| Section | Function | Key Claim | Evidence Needed | Citation Support | Figures/Tables | Risk | Drafting Instruction |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|

## Drafting Notes

- Each section must serve the confirmed research spine.
- Each result section must map to evidence IDs.
- Each background or discussion claim must map to citation IDs.
- Each limitation must correspond to a real design or evidence boundary.
